name: 道の駅 かみみね
desc: 2025年開業、長崎街道(国道34号)沿いの佐賀県最大級の道の駅。脊振山系や有明海の農水産物、上峰町の特産品が並ぶ直売所とフードコートを併設。
descEn: Opened in 2025 along the Nagasaki Kaido (Route 34), this is one of Saga Prefecture's largest roadside stations. Its market and food court feature produce from the Sefuri mountains and Ariake Sea, along with Kamimine Town specialties.
